title: CoStar Group Announces Winners of 2023 CoStar Impact Awards
text: WASHINGTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP), a leading provider of online real estate marketplaces, information, and analytics in the property markets, today announced the winners of the 2023 CoStar Impact Awards. The CoStar Impact Awards recognize exemplary commercial real estate transactions and projects completed in 2022 that have significantly influenced neighborhoods or submarkets across 128 major international markets in the United States, Canada, and the United Kingdom.

title: 4 Toxic Stocks That You Should Eliminate From Your Portfolio
text: Similar to identifying stocks with growth potential, pinpointing toxic stocks and discarding them at the right time is the key to avoid losses. CSGP, DH, MNTK and WEST are few toxic stocks you should dump now.
